parameters.query:
WITH matched_props AS (
  SELECT
    id, code, address, property_type, zone,
    land_area::numeric   AS land_area,
    construction_area::numeric AS construction_area,
    price::numeric       AS price,
    status
  FROM properties
  WHERE is_active = true
    AND (code ILIKE $1 OR address ILIKE ('%' || $1 || '%'))
)
-- ▸ Confirmed (already linked in property_interests)
SELECT
  'confirmado'                       AS match_type,
  c.id                               AS client_id,
  c.first_name || ' ' || c.last_name AS client_name,
  c.phone, c.email,
  c.interest_description,
  pi.interest_level,
  pi.interest_date::text             AS interest_date,
  pi.notes,
  p.id                               AS property_id,
  p.code                             AS property_code,
  p.address                          AS property_address,
  p.status                           AS property_status,
  p.property_type, p.zone,
  p.land_area, p.construction_area, p.price
FROM property_interests pi
JOIN clients c ON c.id = pi.client_id
JOIN matched_props p ON p.id = pi.property_id

UNION ALL

-- ▸ Potential (clients whose interest_description mentions property type or zone)
SELECT
  'potencial'                        AS match_type,
  c.id                               AS client_id,
  c.first_name || ' ' || c.last_name AS client_name,
  c.phone, c.email,
  c.interest_description,
  NULL                               AS interest_level,
  NULL                               AS interest_date,
  NULL                               AS notes,
  p.id                               AS property_id,
  p.code                             AS property_code,
  p.address                          AS property_address,
  p.status                           AS property_status,
  p.property_type, p.zone,
  p.land_area, p.construction_area, p.price
FROM clients c
CROSS JOIN matched_props p
WHERE
  c.interest_description IS NOT NULL
  AND c.interest_description <> ''
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM property_interests pi2
    WHERE pi2.client_id = c.id AND pi2.property_id = p.id
  )
  AND (
    LOWER(c.interest_description) LIKE '%' || LOWER(p.property_type) || '%'
    OR LOWER(c.interest_description) LIKE '%' || LOWER(p.zone) || '%'
    OR LOWER(c.interest_description) LIKE '%' || LOWER(p.address) || '%'
  )
ORDER BY property_id, match_type
LIMIT 80;
